- Navbar:

    - Navigation: Home, Treatments, Categories, About us, Fees, Blog, Contact.
    - Add a 'Menu' hamburger button.
- Header:
    - Huge serif H1 'Dentistry'.
    - Small label 'Services' with a thin line.
    - Paragraph: 'We are excellent in dental care and treatments for all patients. We take care of you and your family.'
    - Dark pill button 'Explore' with an arrow icon.
- Content Rows (Alternating Layout, full-width blocks, large rounded photos):
    - Row 1 (Text left, Image right): 'General Dentistry'. Text: 'We specialize in helping patients with general treatments and making their smiles look great.' List: Dental hygiene, Dental fillings, Dental crowns, Dental bridges. Button: Circular arrow button with 'General Dentistry'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_3}}.
    - Row 2 (Image left, Text right): 'Cosmetic Dentistry'. Text: 'Enhance the natural beauty of your smile with our premium cosmetic procedures. Tailored treatments to brighten, align, and perfect your appearance.' List: Teeth whitening, Veneers, Bonding, Smile makeover. Button: Circular arrow button with 'Cosmetic Dentistry'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}}.
    - Row 3 (Text left, Image right): 'Teeth Straightening'. Text: 'Modern orthodontic solutions designed for comfort and discretion. Achieve perfect alignment and optimal function with our advanced straightening systems.' List: Clear aligners, Traditional braces, Retainers, Consultations. Button: Circular arrow button with 'Teeth Straightening'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}}.
- Footer (Dark background):
    - Brand 'Klaas'.
    - Emails: clinic@klaas.com and new.patients@klaas.com.
    - Phone: 333 (55) 328 786.
    - Social icons and a 'Book online' button.
- Overall Style:
    - Cream background (#fbf9f8 from design system).
    - Midnight-blue (#001f3f) and tan accents.
    - Generous whitespace.
    - Large rounded corners for Garamond","bodyFontFamily":"Inter","labelFontFamily":"Inter"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/92a0275dd6e74add9883844ada964920","designSystem":{"displayName":"Klaas","styleGuidelines":"## Brand & Style
This design system embodies a premium, editorial aesthetic tailored for a high-end dental clinic. The brand personality is clinical excellence met with hospitality-level comfort. The visual language leans into **Minimalism** with a focus on high-fidelity typography and intentional negative space to evoke a sense of calm, cleanliness, and precision.

The target audience seeks a boutique experience where medical expertise feels sophisticated and personalized. The UI should feel airy and unhurried, moving away from traditional sterile medical interfaces toward a luxury lifestyle or high-fashion editorial feel.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout follows a **fixed grid** philosophy for desktop to maintain the controlled composition of a magazine. 

- **Desktop:** 12-column grid with a maximum width of 1200px. Large margins (64px+) are encouraged to push content toward the center, creating a focused, premium experience.
- **Mobile:** 4-column grid with 20px margins.
- **Rhythm:** Use a base 8px scale. Vertical rhythm should be loose; section gaps of 120px or more are preferred to allow each piece of content to breathe. Overlapping elements (e.g., an image slightly breaking the grid) can be used to reinforce the editorial aesthetic.

## Elevation & Depth
In alignment with the minimalist-editorial style, depth is created through **Tonal Layers** and **Low-contrast outlines** rather than heavy shadows.

- **Surfaces:** Use subtle shifts from the Cream background to a slightly lighter or darker beige to define areas.
- **Shadows:** When necessary (e.g., for floating modals), use extremely diffused, low-opacity shadows with a hint of the secondary tan color (`rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.1)`).
- **Borders:** Use thin (1px) borders in the Tan or a lightened version of the Midnight Blue to define containers without adding visual weight.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the Midnight Blue background with Cream text, featuring a rectangular shape with subtle 4px corner radii. Secondary buttons should be outlined (Ghost) with Tan borders.
- **Input Fields:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border or a very light Tan perimeter. Labels should use the `label-caps` style above the field.
- **Cards:** Use "The Frame" style—generous internal padding (32px+), light Tan borders, and no shadows. Images within cards should have a subtle 4px radius.
- **Chips/Badges:** Small, pill-shaped elements using the Tan color at 10% opacity with 100% opacity Tan text.
- **Specialty Components:** 
    - **Booking Widget:** A persistent but discrete element using a glassmorphic background blur to float over the editorial content.
    - **Testimonial Slider:** Large-scale EB Garamond quotes with an "italic" serif treatment to emphasize the personal nature of patient care.","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","font":"EB_GARAMOND","roundness":"ROUND_FOUR","customColor":"#001f3f","headlineFont":"EB_GARAMOND","bodyFont":"INTER","labelFont":"INTER","namedColors":{"background":"#fbf9f8","error":"#ba1a1a","error_container":"#ffdad6","inverse_on_surface":"#f2f0f0","inverse_primary":"#afc8f0","inverse_surface":"#303030","on_background":"#1b1c1c","on_error":"#ffffff","on_error_container":"#93000a","on_primary":"#ffffff","on_primary_container":"#6f88ad","on_primary_fixed":"#001c3a","on_primary_fixed_variant":"#2f486a","on_secondary":"#ffffff","on_secondary_container":"#765f3d","on_secondary_fixed":"#281801","on_secondary_fixed_variant":"#584324","on_surface":"#1b1c1c","on_surface_variant":"#43474e","on_tertiary":"#ffffff","on_tertiary_container":"#868783","on_tertiary_fixed":"#1b1c1a","on_tertiary_fixed_variant":"#464744","outline":"#74777f","outline_variant":"#c4c6cf","primary":"#000613","primary_container":"#001f3f","primary_fixed":"#d4e3ff","primary_fixed_dim":"#afc8f0","secondary":"#725a39","secondary_container":"#fbdbb0","secondary_fixed":"#feddb3","secondary_fixed_dim":"#e1c299","surface":"#fbf9f8","surface_bright":"#fbf9f8","surface_container":"#efeded","surface_container_high":"#eae8e7","surface_container_highest":"#e4e2e2","surface_container_low":"#f5f3f3","surface_container_lowest":"#ffffff","surface_dim":"#dbd9d9","surface_tint":"#476083","surface_variant":"#e4e2e2","tertiary":"#050605","tertiary_container":"#1e1f1d","tertiary_fixed":"#e3e2df","tertiary_fixed_dim":"#c7c7c3"},"designMd":"---

## Brand & Style
This design system embodies a premium, editorial aesthetic tailored for a high-end dental clinic. The brand personality is clinical excellence met with hospitality-level comfort. The visual language leans into **Minimalism** with a focus on high-fidelity typography and intentional negative space to evoke a sense of calm, cleanliness, and precision.

The target audience seeks a boutique experience where medical expertise feels sophisticated and personalized. The UI should feel airy and unhurried, moving away from traditional sterile medical interfaces toward a luxury lifestyle or high-fashion editorial feel.

## Colors
The palette is rooted in a warm, organic foundation to avoid the coldness often associated with dental practices.

- **Primary (#001F3F):** A deep Midnight Blue used for primary branding, navigation, and high-contrast text. It represents authority and stability.
- **Secondary (#D2B48C):** A muted Tan/Beige used for accents, active states, and soft decorative elements. It adds warmth and a human touch.
- **Background (#FDFCF8):** A warm Off-White/Cream serves as the primary canvas, providing a soft, paper-like quality that reduces eye strain and feels more inviting than pure white.
- **Neutral (#4A4A4A):** A soft charcoal used for secondary body text to maintain legibility without the harshness of true black.

## Typography
The typographic hierarchy utilizes **EB Garamond** (as a high-quality alternative to Gilda Display) for headlines to establish a literary, trustworthy, and premium tone. **Inter** is utilized for functional text and body copy to ensure clarity and modern clinical precision.

- **Headlines:** Should use generous tracking (letter-spacing) in smaller sizes and slightly tighter tracking for large display headers.
- **Body Text:** Set with ample line height to maintain an "airy" editorial feel.
- **Labels:** Small caps with increased letter spacing should be used for section headers or categories to add a touch of formal elegance.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout follows a **fixed grid** philosophy for desktop to maintain the controlled composition of a magazine. 

- **Desktop:** 12-column grid with a maximum width of 1200px. Large margins (64px+) are encouraged to push content toward the center, creating a focused, premium experience.
- **Mobile:** 4-column grid with 20px margins.
- **Rhythm:** Use a base 8px scale. Vertical rhythm should be loose; section gaps of 120px or more are preferred to allow each piece of content to breathe. Overlapping elements (e.g., an image slightly breaking the grid) can be used to reinforce the editorial aesthetic.

## Elevation & Depth
In alignment with the minimalist-editorial style, depth is created through **Tonal Layers** and **Low-contrast outlines** rather than heavy shadows.

- **Surfaces:** Use subtle shifts from the Cream background to a slightly lighter or darker beige to define areas.
- **Shadows:** When necessary (e.g., for floating modals), use extremely diffused, low-opacity shadows with a hint of the secondary tan color (`rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.1)`).
- **Borders:** Use thin (1px) borders in the Tan or a lightened version of the Midnight Blue to define containers without adding visual weight.

## Shapes
The shape language is refined and subtle. **Soft** roundedness (4px-8px) is applied to maintain a modern feel without becoming too "bubbly" or informal. This slight rounding takes the edge off the clinical nature of the brand while remaining professional and structured.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the Midnight Blue background with Cream text, featuring a rectangular shape with subtle 4px corner radii. Secondary buttons should be outlined (Ghost) with Tan borders.
- **Input Fields:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border or a very light Tan perimeter. Labels should use the `label-caps` style above the field.
- **Cards:** Use "The Frame" style—generous internal padding (32px+), light Tan borders, and no shadows. Images within cards should have a subtle 4px radius.
- **Chips/Badges:** Small, pill-shaped elements using the Tan color at 10% opacity with 100% opacity Tan text.
- **Specialty Components:** 
    - **Booking Widget:** A persistent but discrete element using a glassmorphic background blur to float over the editorial content.
    - **Testimonial Slider:** Large-scale EB Garamond quotes with an "italic" serif treatment to emphasize the personal nature of patient care.","colorVariant":"FIDELITY","overridePrimaryColor":"#001f3f","overrideSecondaryColor":"#d2b48c","overrideTertiaryColor":"#fdfcf8","overrideNeutralColor":"#4a4a4a","spacingScale":2,"typography":{"body-lg":{"fontFamily":"Inter","fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":"400","lineHeight":"1.6"},"body-md":{"fontFamily":"Inter","fontSize":"16px","fontWeight":"400","lineHeight":"1.6"},"display-lg":{"fontFamily":"EB Garamond","fontSize":"64px","fontWeight":"400","lineHeight":"1.1","letterSpacing":"-0.02em"},"display-lg-mobile":{"fontFamily":"EB Garamond","fontSize":"40px","fontWeight":"400","lineHeight":"1.2","letterSpacing":"-0.01em"},"headline-md":{"fontFamily":"EB Garamond","fontSize":"32px","fontWeight":"400","lineHeight":"1.3"},"headline-sm":{"fontFamily":"EB Garamond","fontSize":"24px","fontWeight":"500","lineHeight":"1.4"},"label-caps":{"fontFamily":"Inter","fontSize":"12px","fontWeight":"600","lineHeight":"1","letterSpacing":"0.1em"}},"spacing":{"container-max":"1200px","gutter":"24px","margin-desktop":"64px","margin-mobile":"20px","section-gap":"120px","unit":"8px"},"headlineFontFamily":"Eb Garamond","bodyFontFamily":"Inter","labelFontFamily":"Inter"}},"version":"1"}}],"theme":{}}},{"text":"I've updated the 'Categories' page for Klaas Dental Clinic to perfectly align with your specifications. 

Key improvements include:
- **Refined Navigation**: Added the 'Dentist template' subtitle to the logo, established the top bar with contact links, and included the hamburger menu for a complete header experience.
- **Enhanced Visual Hierarchy**: The header now features the large serif H1 'Dentistry' with the 'Services' label and a dark pill-shaped 'Explore' button.
- **Alternating Service Rows**: Restructured the 'General', 'Cosmetic', and 'Teeth Straightening' sections into full-width alternating blocks with generous whitespace and large rounded imagery for a high-end, modern look.
- **Detailed Dark Footer**: Implemented the dark theme footer with your specific clinic contact details, social icons, and a clear 'Book online' call to action.

The design maintains the elegant cream background with midnight-blue and tan accents to ensure a premium, professional feel throughout. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any of the content or layout!"},{"suggestion":"Add a testimonials section before the footer"},{"suggestion":"Make the 'Explore' button trigger a scroll animation"},{"suggestion":"Update the 'Treatments' page with a similar style"}]}

designSystem.styleGuidelines:
## Brand & Style
This design system embodies a premium, editorial aesthetic tailored for a high-end dental clinic. The brand personality is clinical excellence met with hospitality-level comfort. The visual language leans into **Minimalism** with a focus on high-fidelity typography and intentional negative space to evoke a sense of calm, cleanliness, and precision.

The target audience seeks a boutique experience where medical expertise feels sophisticated and personalized. The UI should feel airy and unhurried, moving away from traditional sterile medical interfaces toward a luxury lifestyle or high-fashion editorial feel.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout follows a **fixed grid** philosophy for desktop to maintain the controlled composition of a magazine. 

- **Desktop:** 12-column grid with a maximum width of 1200px. Large margins (64px+) are encouraged to push content toward the center, creating a focused, premium experience.
- **Mobile:** 4-column grid with 20px margins.
- **Rhythm:** Use a base 8px scale. Vertical rhythm should be loose; section gaps of 120px or more are preferred to allow each piece of content to breathe. Overlapping elements (e.g., an image slightly breaking the grid) can be used to reinforce the editorial aesthetic.

## Elevation & Depth
In alignment with the minimalist-editorial style, depth is created through **Tonal Layers** and **Low-contrast outlines** rather than heavy shadows.

- **Surfaces:** Use subtle shifts from the Cream background to a slightly lighter or darker beige to define areas.
- **Shadows:** When necessary (e.g., for floating modals), use extremely diffused, low-opacity shadows with a hint of the secondary tan color (`rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.1)`).
- **Borders:** Use thin (1px) borders in the Tan or a lightened version of the Midnight Blue to define containers without adding visual weight.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the Midnight Blue background with Cream text, featuring a rectangular shape with subtle 4px corner radii. Secondary buttons should be outlined (Ghost) with Tan borders.
- **Input Fields:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border or a very light Tan perimeter. Labels should use the `label-caps` style above the field.
- **Cards:** Use "The Frame" style—generous internal padding (32px+), light Tan borders, and no shadows. Images within cards should have a subtle 4px radius.
- **Chips/Badges:** Small, pill-shaped elements using the Tan color at 10% opacity with 100% opacity Tan text.
- **Specialty Components:** 
    - **Booking Widget:** A persistent but discrete element using a glassmorphic background blur to float over the editorial content.
    - **Testimonial Slider:** Large-scale EB Garamond quotes with an "italic" serif treatment to emphasize the personal nature of patient care.

## Brand & Style
This design system embodies a premium, editorial aesthetic tailored for a high-end dental clinic. The brand personality is clinical excellence met with hospitality-level comfort. The visual language leans into **Minimalism** with a focus on high-fidelity typography and intentional negative space to evoke a sense of calm, cleanliness, and precision.

The target audience seeks a boutique experience where medical expertise feels sophisticated and personalized. The UI should feel airy and unhurried, moving away from traditional sterile medical interfaces toward a luxury lifestyle or high-fashion editorial feel.

## Colors
The palette is rooted in a warm, organic foundation to avoid the coldness often associated with dental practices.

- **Primary (#001F3F):** A deep Midnight Blue used for primary branding, navigation, and high-contrast text. It represents authority and stability.
- **Secondary (#D2B48C):** A muted Tan/Beige used for accents, active states, and soft decorative elements. It adds warmth and a human touch.
- **Background (#FDFCF8):** A warm Off-White/Cream serves as the primary canvas, providing a soft, paper-like quality that reduces eye strain and feels more inviting than pure white.
- **Neutral (#4A4A4A):** A soft charcoal used for secondary body text to maintain legibility without the harshness of true black.

## Typography
The typographic hierarchy utilizes **EB Garamond** (as a high-quality alternative to Gilda Display) for headlines to establish a literary, trustworthy, and premium tone. **Inter** is utilized for functional text and body copy to ensure clarity and modern clinical precision.

- **Headlines:** Should use generous tracking (letter-spacing) in smaller sizes and slightly tighter tracking for large display headers.
- **Body Text:** Set with ample line height to maintain an "airy" editorial feel.
- **Labels:** Small caps with increased letter spacing should be used for section headers or categories to add a touch of formal elegance.

## Layout & Spacing
The layout follows a **fixed grid** philosophy for desktop to maintain the controlled composition of a magazine. 

- **Desktop:** 12-column grid with a maximum width of 1200px. Large margins (64px+) are encouraged to push content toward the center, creating a focused, premium experience.
- **Mobile:** 4-column grid with 20px margins.
- **Rhythm:** Use a base 8px scale. Vertical rhythm should be loose; section gaps of 120px or more are preferred to allow each piece of content to breathe. Overlapping elements (e.g., an image slightly breaking the grid) can be used to reinforce the editorial aesthetic.

## Elevation & Depth
In alignment with the minimalist-editorial style, depth is created through **Tonal Layers** and **Low-contrast outlines** rather than heavy shadows.

- **Surfaces:** Use subtle shifts from the Cream background to a slightly lighter or darker beige to define areas.
- **Shadows:** When necessary (e.g., for floating modals), use extremely diffused, low-opacity shadows with a hint of the secondary tan color (`rgba(210, 180, 140, 0.1)`).
- **Borders:** Use thin (1px) borders in the Tan or a lightened version of the Midnight Blue to define containers without adding visual weight.

## Shapes
The shape language is refined and subtle. **Soft** roundedness (4px-8px) is applied to maintain a modern feel without becoming too "bubbly" or informal. This slight rounding takes the edge off the clinical nature of the brand while remaining professional and structured.

## Components
- **Buttons:** Primary buttons use the Midnight Blue background with Cream text, featuring a rectangular shape with subtle 4px corner radii. Secondary buttons should be outlined (Ghost) with Tan borders.
- **Input Fields:** Minimalist design with only a bottom border or a very light Tan perimeter. Labels should use the `label-caps` style above the field.
- **Cards:** Use "The Frame" style—generous internal padding (32px+), light Tan borders, and no shadows. Images within cards should have a subtle 4px radius.
- **Chips/Badges:** Small, pill-shaped elements using the Tan color at 10% opacity with 100% opacity Tan text.
- **Specialty Components:** 
    - **Booking Widget:** A persistent but discrete element using a glassmorphic background blur to float over the editorial content.
    - **Testimonial Slider:** Large-scale EB Garamond quotes with an "italic" serif treatment to emphasize the personal nature of patient care.

screens.prompt:
Regenerate the Categories page with these specific requirements:

- Navbar: 
    - Logo 'Klaas' with subtitle 'Dentist template'.
    - Top bar links: hello@klaas.com, 'Call us', and 'Book online'.
    - Navigation: Home, Treatments, Categories, About us, Fees, Blog, Contact.
    - Add a 'Menu' hamburger button.
- Header:
    - Huge serif H1 'Dentistry'.
    - Small label 'Services' with a thin line.
    - Paragraph: 'We are excellent in dental care and treatments for all patients. We take care of you and your family.'
    - Dark pill button 'Explore' with an arrow icon.
- Content Rows (Alternating Layout, full-width blocks, large rounded photos):
    - Row 1 (Text left, Image right): 'General Dentistry'. Text: 'We specialize in helping patients with general treatments and making their smiles look great.' List: Dental hygiene, Dental fillings, Dental crowns, Dental bridges. Button: Circular arrow button with 'General Dentistry'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_3}}.
    - Row 2 (Image left, Text right): 'Cosmetic Dentistry'. Text: 'Enhance the natural beauty of your smile with our premium cosmetic procedures. Tailored treatments to brighten, align, and perfect your appearance.' List: Teeth whitening, Veneers, Bonding, Smile makeover. Button: Circular arrow button with 'Cosmetic Dentistry'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_2}}.
    - Row 3 (Text left, Image right): 'Teeth Straightening'. Text: 'Modern orthodontic solutions designed for comfort and discretion. Achieve perfect alignment and optimal function with our advanced straightening systems.' List: Clear aligners, Traditional braces, Retainers, Consultations. Button: Circular arrow button with 'Teeth Straightening'. Use image {{DATA:IMAGE:IMAGE_6}}.
- Footer (Dark background):
    - Brand 'Klaas'.
    - Emails: clinic@klaas.com and new.patients@klaas.com.
    - Phone: 333 (55) 328 786.
    - Social icons and a 'Book online' button.
- Overall Style:
    - Cream background (#fbf9f8 from design system).
    - Midnight-blue (#001f3f) and tan accents.
    - Generous whitespace.
    - Large rounded corners for images.
screens.title: Categories | Klaas Dental Clinic Updated

outputComponents.text:
I've updated the 'Categories' page for Klaas Dental Clinic to perfectly align with your specifications. 

Key improvements include:
- **Refined Navigation**: Added the 'Dentist template' subtitle to the logo, established the top bar with contact links, and included the hamburger menu for a complete header experience.
- **Enhanced Visual Hierarchy**: The header now features the large serif H1 'Dentistry' with the 'Services' label and a dark pill-shaped 'Explore' button.
- **Alternating Service Rows**: Restructured the 'General', 'Cosmetic', and 'Teeth Straightening' sections into full-width alternating blocks with generous whitespace and large rounded imagery for a high-end, modern look.
- **Detailed Dark Footer**: Implemented the dark theme footer with your specific clinic contact details, social icons, and a clear 'Book online' call to action.

The design maintains the elegant cream background with midnight-blue and tan accents to ensure a premium, professional feel throughout. Let me know if you'd like to adjust any of the content or layout!

outputComponents.suggestion: Add a testimonials section before the footer
Make the 'Explore' button trigger a scroll animation
Update the 'Treatments' page with a similar style
